name: package-claim-helper
description: One-stop AI courier claim assistant for lost, damaged, or disputed packages: legal analysis, compensation calculation, escalation paths, and document generation for all major China express companies.
author: Harry (code agent)
firstSuccessPath: Paste your package issue → receive legal analysis, compensation calculation, escalation path, and ready-to-file appeal documents in under 60 seconds
safety_boundary: Does not replace legal advice, does not intervene in litigation, does not handle non-courier logistics disputes, does not file complaints on user behalf.

workflowSteps.name: Event Reception → Intent Recognition
workflowSteps.input: Natural language description of courier issue
workflowSteps.output: Dispute type, courier company, user role identified; non-courier issues rejected

workflowSteps.name: Information Collection
workflowSteps.output: Complete set of required fields for claim analysis

workflowSteps.name: Legal Matching → Liability Determination
workflowSteps.input: Dispute type + item details + courier company
workflowSteps.output: Responsible party, applicable laws, claimable rights

workflowSteps.name: Compensation Calculation
workflowSteps.input: Insured status, item value, damage degree

workflowSteps.name: Escalation Path Generation
workflowSteps.output: 5-level escalation route with channels, times, scripts

workflowSteps.name: Legal Document Generation
workflowSteps.output: Claim letter, postal appeal, 12315 complaint, evidence checklist

workflowSteps.name: Evidence Collection Checklist
workflowSteps.output: Personalized evidence checklist with priority and acquisition methods

workflowSteps.name: Key Deadline Management
workflowSteps.output: Personalized deadline calendar with action reminders

input.dispute_type: enum (lost_package, damaged_goods, false_delivery, station_dispute, missing_items, cross_border, oversized_damage, customs_hold, service_complaint, wrong_delivery)
input.platform: enum (taobao, jd, pinduoduo, douyin, xianyu, other, none)
